text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takarazuka Kinen has finally
come—and this time...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Brian isn't running.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Haha! ☆ So this is my chance! It's just me now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But that means I definitely can't lose. I have to do
whatever needs to be done.
choice_data_list: Go out and grow a little more!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Copy that! ☆ You say "grow"! I say "how tall"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So you came.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. I had no reason to refuse.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: But why did you call me out all this way?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
If you don't have a good reason, I'm never talking
to you again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey now, calm down. You're smart, so I'm sure
you've figured it out already.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun is racing in this Takarazuka
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. You don't have to pretend you're not
interested.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know you want something from her. Something
that's gonna set you free.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...So you noticed that, huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Only because I've been trying to catch up to you
for so many years.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
To be honest, I don't know exactly what it is you
want.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: At the very least, I know that you're holding back.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And holding back is boring, no?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. And that's why you're putting your hopes
into her?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: You've taken her under your wing.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh, you heard?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
The way she runs—it's like she doesn't know how
to give up. Reminds me of a certain someone.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Haha, is that so? She's just as driven as you are.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'll tell you this. She can still improve.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And one day, when you claim you've reached the
end, she'll knock some sense into you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: And then, once you're finally awake...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna crush you into dust.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...Hmph. You've gone soft. To think you'd help an
enemy.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying? She's not your enemy—she's
your rival.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph.
